title: chamomilla maritima
intro: Chamomilla maritima, also known as sea chamomile, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the coastal regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Chamomilla maritima include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and alleviating menstrual cramps, making it a popular remedy for women's health. Chamomilla maritima can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
